case_title: RAUL MARTINEZ et al VS. BRIAN ERIC KICKEY et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, RAUL MARTINEZ, JOSUE MARTINEZ, ISAAC AS TO DEFENDANT KICKEY, BRIAN ERIC AHMED, SYED IZHAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-26-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AHMED, SYED IZHAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-13-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. MATTER WAS NOT CALENDARED FOR MAY 25, 2012. MATTER CONTINUED FOR TRIAL. ALL PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 1/24/13 TO DEFENDANT BRIAN ERIC KICKEY, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT BRIAN KICKEY. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT AHMED, SYED IZHAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KICKEY, BRIAN ERIC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT KICKEY, BRIAN ERIC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT BRIAN KICKEY, ONLY TO APR-24-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
